title: indices.delete_index_template

name.description: Comma-separated list of index template names used to limit the request. Wildcard (*) expressions are supported.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

timeout.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

description:
Delete an index template.

The provided <index-template> may contain multiple template names separated by a comma. If multiple template
names are specified then there is no wildcard support and the provided names should match completely with
existing templates.
